commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Wicked. Alexandrian Septuagint, "just. "But Grabe substitutes unjust; (Haydock) as otherwise, Eliphaz would argue against his own principles: unless just be put ironically for hypocrites. (Calmet)
Wilt thou imitate the ancient giants, before the deluge? (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: 13. As the ‘way’ of our Redeemer is humility, so the way of the world is pride. And so wicked men tread the way of the world, in that by the desires of this world they walk in self-exaltation.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
